title: dryopteris divisa
intro: Dryopteris divisa, also known as the golden-scaled buckler fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris divisa include reducing coughs and colds, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular choice in traditional herbal medicine.
